title: Open and reassemble a beehive
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Open and reassemble a beehive demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare to open a beehive

pcs.text: Confirm the activity to be undertaken according to job requirements.
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm the activity to be undertaken according to job requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm the activity to be undertaken according to job requirements.

pcs.text: Identify health and safety hazards and take action according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify health and safety hazards and take action according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify health and safety hazards and take action according to workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Select, ensure serviceability, fit and use personal protective equipment
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select, ensure serviceability, fit and use personal protective equipment?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select, ensure serviceability, fit and use personal protective equipment.

pcs.text: Identify and select tools and equipment required according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and select tools and equipment required according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and select tools and equipment required according to workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Check tools for serviceability and  ensure faults are rectified or reported to supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check tools for serviceability and  ensure faults are rectified or reported to supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check tools for serviceability and  ensure faults are rectified or reported to supervisor.

pcs.text: Assess weather conditions and nectar flow and adjust planned activities to minimise risk of robbing and stress to bees
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess weather conditions and nectar flow and adjust planned activities to minimise risk of robbing and stress to bees?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess weather conditions and nectar flow and adjust planned activities to minimise risk of robbing and stress to bees.

pcs.text: Comply with site quarantine and biosecurity requirements according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Comply with site quarantine and biosecurity requirements according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Comply with site quarantine and biosecurity requirements according to workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Use safe manual or mechanical handling techniques to minimise to prevent injuries and damage to hives
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Use safe manual or mechanical handling techniques to minimise to prevent injuries and damage to hives?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Use safe manual or mechanical handling techniques to minimise to prevent injuries and damage to hives.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare to open a beehive

elements.title: Open the beehive

pcs.text: Apply smoke to control bees throughout the process
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Apply smoke to control bees throughout the process?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Apply smoke to control bees throughout the process.

pcs.text: Carry out work from a safe position in relation to beehive
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Carry out work from a safe position in relation to beehive?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Carry out work from a safe position in relation to beehive.

pcs.text: Open beehive using hive tool and remove components according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Open beehive using hive tool and remove components according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Open beehive using hive tool and remove components according to workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Place the components safely to ensure they remain clean and free from contaminants according to biosecurity and workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Place the components safely to ensure they remain clean and free from contaminants according to biosecurity and workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Place the components safely to ensure they remain clean and free from contaminants according to biosecurity and workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Open the beehive

elements.title: Reassemble the beehive

pcs.text: Replace components according to workplace procedures and brood manipulation requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Replace components according to workplace procedures and brood manipulation requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Replace components according to workplace procedures and brood manipulation requirements.

pcs.text: Reassemble the hive according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Reassemble the hive according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Reassemble the hive according to workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Close the hive and secure according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Close the hive and secure according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Close the hive and secure according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Reassemble the beehive
